## Checklist

- [ ] Commands in code blocks are copy-paste runnable (or marked as illustrative)
- [ ] Tool names are spelled exactly as the tool authors spell them
- [ ] Any new benchmarks or thresholds have a stated basis (tool docs, paper, community standard)
- [ ] `.skill` files in `releases/` have been regenerated if SKILL.md or references/ changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md has been updated under `[Unreleased]`
